mapper.select: SELECT record_status_code AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM person WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at < #{endDate} GROUP BY record_status_code ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT gender_code AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM person WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY gender_code ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT ethnicity_code AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM person WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY ethnicity_code ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{topN}
SELECT household_type_code AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM household WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY household_type_code ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT status AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM household WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT h.region_code AS regionCode, r.region_name AS regionName, COUNT(r.person_id) AS currentPopulation FROM residence_registration rr JOIN household h ON h.household_id = rr.household_id JOIN admin_region r ON r.region_code = h.region_code GROUP BY h.region_code, r.region_name ORDER BY currentPopulation DESC
SELECT current_region_code AS regionCode, COUNT(*) AS count FROM floating_population WHERE 1=1 AND status = #{status} GROUP BY current_region_code ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT certificate_status AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM certificate GROUP BY certificate_status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN valid_until IS NULL THEN 'NO_EXPIRY' WHEN valid_until < CURDATE() THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN valid_until < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{warnDays} DAY) THEN 'EXPIRING' ELSE 'VALID' END AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM certificate GROUP BY code ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(in_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM migration_in WHERE in_date IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(in_date, '%Y-%m') >= #{sinceMonth} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(out_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM migration_out WHERE out_date IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(out_date, '%Y-%m') >= #{sinceMonth} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT key_type_code AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM key_population WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY key_type_code ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT 'PERSON_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'HOUSEHOLD_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'REGISTRATION_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_registration) AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'FLOATING_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM floating_population WHERE status = 'ACTIVE') AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'KEY_POPULATION_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_population WHERE status = 'ACTIVE') AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'CERTIFICATE_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certificate) AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'PENDING_APPROVAL_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_approval_request WHERE status = 'PENDING') AS value UNION ALL SELECT 'PENDING_APPLICATION_TOTAL' AS code, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM business_application WHERE status IN ('SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW')) AS value
SELECT business_type_code AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM business_application WHERE status IN ('SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW') GROUP BY business_type_code ORDER BY count DESC
